overview: Save Shop System is a mobile-first SaaS platform for Indian shop management with batch-wise FIFO inventory, multi-shop support, smart billing, PRO customer tracking, and now a Super Admin Dashboard for real-time platform monitoring.
features: Multi-shop management with per-shop data isolation
Smart billing with Wholesaler/Retailer/Regular price modes
PRO customer tracking with VIP/Gold/Silver tier badges
Super Admin Dashboard with real-time user and shop analytics
Offline mode with auto background sync
